name: South African Sweet Potato Fritters
recipeIngredient: 1 pound sweet potatoes, peeled and cut into 1/2 inch cubes
Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy saucepan or fryer, heat 2 inches of oil to 375 degrees.
2. Grate the sweet potatoes in a medium-sized bowl and cover them with boiling water. Let them stand for 15 minutes, then drain off the water.
3. Slowly add the flour, egg, salt, and pepper to the grated sweet potatoes, stirring until well mixed. The mixture should be thick enough to hold its shape when picked up with a tablespoon. If needed, add a bit of warm water to thin the mixture or more flour to thicken it.
4. Drop spoonfuls of the mixture into the hot oil, working in batches if necessary. Cook the fritters for 3 to 5 minutes, or until they float to the surface and are slightly browned on each side.
5. Remove the fritters with a slotted spoon and drain on absorbent paper. Serve hot.
Per serving: 209 calories, 3 gm protein, 26 gm carbohydrates, 10 gm fat, 36 mg cholesterol, 1 gm saturated fat, 196 mg sodium.
